CTA_BANNER.DEFAULT: Add your latest transactions for accurate insights
CTA_BANNER.NO_ATTRIBUTIONS: Attribute your transactions to crops and animal groups to unlock the per-variety breakdown
CTA_BANNER.NO_TRANSACTIONS: Start recording your revenues and expenses to track profitability across your crops and animals

KPI.NO_TREND_TOOLTIP: Add more data from the previous year to calculate a trend
KPI.YOY_TOOLTIP: Compared to the same date range in the previous year.
